titleStmt.title: SII 38.290: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 290. (A.R. No. 290 of 1912.) KUṞAṄGAṆIMUṬṬAM, CHEYYAR TALUK, NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT. On the north wall, central shrine, Koyyamalarēśvara temple.

summary.p: Damaged in the middle and end. It records a royal grant of five vēli of taxfree land as dēvadāna-iṟaiyil and also site around the temple (tirumaḍaiviḷāgam) to the temple of the god of Tirukkuraṅkaṇimuṭṭam in Pallavapuram in Māvanḍūrpaṟṟu in Ērikiḻ-nāḍu (a sub-division) of Kāliyūr-kōṭṭam. It is stated that these land grants were made inorder to provide food offerings, anointment and also for conducting other rituals to the above god from the tenth regnal year and also for meeting daily expenses of the temple. The land-tax of twenty-five poṉ along with the other (local) taxes and cesses collected from the endowed land and site such as taṟiṟai, sekkiṟai, taṭṭōli, taṭṭar pāṭṭam and other taxes were waived but were ordered to be expended for the worship and services stated above. (cf. No. 292).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirupuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ cikoṉeriṉmai ko
ṇṭāṉ kāliyūrkoṭṭattu Erikiḻnāṭ(ṭi)ṭu māvaṇṭuṟpaṟṟil
pallavapurattu Āḷuṭaiyār tirukkuraṅkaṇimuṭṭamuṭaiya ṉāyaṉā
rkkoyil tāṉattāṟku Irācaṉperuvaḻikku meṟku tirunā
mattukkāṇiyāṉa tiruviruppum cūḻnta tirumaṭaiviḷā
kamum Amutupaṭi cāttuppaṭi tiruppaṇi Uḷḷiṭ(ṭa)ṭu veṇṭu(m)
palapaṭi nittanimantaṅkaḷukkum pallavapurattu Uṭaṉkūṭina Erup
puṭaiyāṉ nilam Ai Aiympatu koṇṭu tevarku yā
ṇṭu pattāvatu Āṭimātam mutal Iṉṉāyaṉāṟku mutalaṭaṅkat teva
tāṉa Iṟaiyiliyākat taṉtu Innilam Aiyivelikkum nicceyi
ppāṉ poṉ Irupattaiñcum Innilattālum Inta tiruviruppu
tirumaṭaiviḷākattālum varum Upātiviṉiyokam taṟiiṟai cek
kiṟai taṭṭoli taṭṭārpāṭṭam Iṭaivariiṉavari Erimiṉpāṭṭam kāṇik
kai viṉiyokam vā
vattu makkaiyāy maṟṟum Eppeṟ
kum Iṉṉa m kaṇakkālum
ṅka tevatāṉaiṟaiyiliyāka tantom Ippaṭikku
lai yi munpu tukai yiṭṭuc cantirātittava
lcella kallilumcempilum ṇṭṭu pū�
tiruppaṇi tāḻvuṟanaṭattum pa Ivai
ṉ Eḻuttu yāṇṭu pattāvatu nāya(nāya)ṉāṟ
ttu § tula(la)yam §
